terminal.orch.optionsTooltip: Orchestration options — applied when you launch an AI CLI and choose Apply
terminal.runGui.tooltip: Open the Run GUI — visualise AI runs as a live graph
terminal.orch.title: Orchestration Options
terminal.orch.hint: Defaults for OrPAD's governed runs (sandboxed execute + verify). Note: launching an AI CLI in the terminal and choosing “Apply” is read-only observation — these options do not apply to it (a live terminal session can't be sandboxed).
terminal.orch.gates: Verification gates (one shell check per line)
terminal.applyOrch.title: Apply orchestration?
terminal.applyOrch.body1: Watch this {agent} session as a live graph in the Run GUI?
terminal.applyOrch.body2: This is read-only observation — OrPAD visualises the tools the CLI runs in the terminal. It does not sandbox or change what the CLI does (it works directly in your workspace). Skip to use the CLI without the graph.
